verdicts.test_1_constraint_propagation: FORCED — Easter Island is the ONLY inhabited island within 100km of the Giza-Nazca great circle in the Pacific
verdicts.test_2_continental_position: Specific positions matter beyond continental geometry (p_narrow=0.000340, p_expanded=0.000510)
verdicts.test_4_island_scan: Easter Island is UNIQUE — only 1 inhabited island(s) within 100km of the Giza-Nazca circle in the entire Pacific
verdicts.test_5_geological: Tectonic sources are ALIGNED with human sites — plate tectonics is the ultimate cause
verdicts.test_6_atmospheric: Circle TRACKS the desert belt (93th percentile for 30° proximity)
verdicts.test_7_equivalent_substitution: The actual Giza-Nazca-Easter triplet is the BEST combination — specific sites matter

overall_assessment: UNRESOLVED: The specific positions of Giza, Nazca, and Easter Island produce unusually good collinearity even among geographic/cultural equivalents. The collinearity appears to be a genuine geometric coincidence.
